mapper.select: SELECT ID, PURCHASE_TITLE, PURCHASE_NO, SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME, PURCHASE_TYPE_CODE, PURCHASE_TYPE_NAME, FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CODE, FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_NAME, TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT, TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT, PURCHASE_STATUS, FAILURE_REASON, APPROVAL_BY, APPROVAL_BY_NAME, APPROVAL_TIME, APPROVAL_REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE ( ID, PURCHASE_TITLE, PURCHASE_NO, SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME, PURCHASE_TYPE_CODE, PURCHASE_TYPE_NAME, FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CODE, FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_NAME, TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT, TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT, PURCHASE_STATUS, FAILURE_REASON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{purchaseTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fixedServiceCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fixedServiceCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxIncludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{taxExcludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{purchaseStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE
PURCHASE_TITLE = #{purchaseTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PURCHASE_NO = #{purchaseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SUPPLIER_ID = #{supplierId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
SUPPLIER_NAME = #{supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PURCHASE_TYPE_CODE = #{purchaseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PURCHASE_TYPE_NAME = #{purchaseTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CODE = #{fixedServiceCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_NAME = #{fixedServiceCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT = #{taxIncludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT = #{taxExcludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
PURCHASE_STATUS = #{purchaseStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FAILURE_REASON = #{failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FAILURE_REASON = NULL,
APPROVAL_BY = #{approvalBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPROVAL_BY = NULL,
APPROVAL_BY_NAME = #{approvalByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPROVAL_BY_NAME = NULL,
APPROVAL_TIME = #{approvalTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
APPROVAL_TIME = NULL,
APPROVAL_REMARK = #{approvalRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPROVAL_REMARK = NULL,
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
